title: Finite Cyclic Geometry Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite cyclic-geometry diagonal-intersection and angle-dot QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact cyclic-quadrilateral replay computes the square's diagonal intersection x-coordinate as 0 while one malformed row claims x-coordinate 1/2, and computes the opposite-angle dot product at B as 0 while another malformed row claims 1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional cyclic-geometry rows only when they add distinct Ptolemy, circle-line correspondence, or higher-degree polynomial-geometry pressure; keep general cyclic-quadrilateral theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed rational cyclic-geometry rows as deterministic exact-coordinate replay obligations.
Replay point-on-circle, diagonal-intersection, diagonal-perpendicularity, and opposite-angle witnesses over exact rationals.
Route rejected finite diagonal-intersection and opposite-angle dot-product claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact coordinate or dot product.
Keep general cyclic-quadrilateral theorems, Ptolemy, angle-chasing, and circle-line correspondence marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
